title: Atractocarpus pentagonioides
taxonomy: Atractocarpus pentagonioides is a species of plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to Australia and New Guinea. This plant is classified as a member of the genus Atractocarpus, which consists of about 20 species of flowering plants. Atractocarpus pentagonioides is a small tree or shrub with unique characteristics, and its classification helps in understanding its evolutionary relationships with other plants.
